infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Recipe Box uses your camera to capture recipe pages for OCR.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Recipe Box accesses your photo library so you can import recipe photos.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Recipe Box can add ingredients to your Supermarket List in Reminders.
